results.snippet: Covers the full bento grid mental model: a single dominant hero card (2×2), 2-3 medium secondary cards, and small detail tiles. Explains CSS grid-column/row span arithmetic and how size hierarchy maps directly to information importance — the exact pattern needed for a 'featured mod' spotlight surrounded by category tiles.
results.title: Bento Grid Layouts: The Complete CSS Guide | Effect.Labs Blog

results.snippet: Production-ready React component block implementing a hero bento grid with a dominant feature card flanked by secondary tiles. Copy-pasteable code using Tailwind utility classes — directly applicable to a mod browser card layout with a featured/hero mod card and supporting category or stat tiles.
results.title: React Bento Grid Feature Showcase Hero Block — shadcn/ui

results.snippet: Practical UX guidance on information hierarchy inside bento cells: which data (name, stat, CTA) belongs at which card size, and how asymmetric sizing creates a 23%-faster task-completion path vs. uniform grids. Relevant to deciding how name/category badge/download count/button should be arranged across card sizes.
results.title: Designing Bento Grids That Actually Work: A 2026 Practical Guide — SaaSFrame

results.snippet: Documents the native CSS masonry spec (grid-template-rows: masonry) now shipping in Safari 26 and behind flags in Chrome/Firefox. Covers the @supports progressive-enhancement pattern for a 291-card browser where variable description lengths would otherwise leave ugly row gaps in a uniform grid.
results.title: CSS Grid Lanes (Masonry Layout) Is Here: A Complete Guide for 2026 — DEV Community

results.snippet: Side-by-side vanilla CSS and Tailwind implementations with noted limits — important for understanding where bento breaks down at high card counts (291 mods). Discusses when to fall back from asymmetric to uniform grid for density-heavy browsing contexts.
results.title: Bento Grid: CSS and Tailwind Recipe, Real Examples and Limits | Superdesign

results.snippet: Applies bento grid principles specifically to dashboard/browser contexts (not just marketing pages): stat highlights, category spotlights, and density considerations. Directly maps to a mod browser that needs to surface download counts and category badges prominently without every card being the same size.
results.title: Bento Grid Dashboard Design: Complete Guide 2026 — Orbix Studio
